title: BasicStats
description: Paper plugin that shows player deaths in the tab list, adds /uptime, /stats, /session, a death log, and an optional sidebar plus tab header/footer.
body:
What is it
BasicStats is a lightweight Paper plugin focused on player information and simple QoL displays.

Features
• Shows each player’s death count in the tab player list
• Tab header/footer with uptime, personal playtime and in-game time
• /uptime to see how long the server has been online
• /stats to show your basic statistics (deaths, kills, walk distance, playtime, etc.)
• /session to show the time since you logged in
• /deathlog to list your last deaths with cause and coordinates
• Optional sidebar scoreboard with key stats, toggle by command

Commands
• /uptime
• /stats
• /session
• /deathlog
• /sidebar toggles the sidebar for yourself

Configuration
File: config.yml
• sidebar.default-enabled: false or true
• tab.update-interval-ticks: 100
• tab.header, tab.footer: MiniMessage text
• deathlog.max-entries: 5

Compatibility
• Servers: Paper and forks like Purpur
• Minecraft: 1.21.x
• No hard dependencies

Installation

Put the jar into the server’s plugins folder

Start the server once to generate config

Edit config.yml if needed and restart
